question: Suppose that Box I contains 6 red balls and 9 green balls, and Box II contains 8 red balls and 12 green balls. options: The events 𝐸1 and 𝐹1 are independent

The conditional probability 𝑃(𝐹1 | 𝐸1) is greater than the conditional probability 𝑃(𝐹2 | 𝐸2) JEE (Advanced) 2026 Paper 1 4/10
